case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. VS CLOVIS BENJAMIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $559.89 FILED BY BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CLOVIS BENJAMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLOVIS BENJAMIN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLOVIS BENJAMIN $559.89 PRINCIPAL, $33.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $593.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLDGEMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED FULLY SATISFIED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CLOVIS BENJAMIN HEARING SET FOR MAY-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-25-1993, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLOVIS BENJAMIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
